text: I feel a quiet anticipation standing in this modern, open space. The emptiness of the meeting room behind glass invites reflection on potential dialogues yet to unfold. Moving toward the vibrant R+D wall, I sense excitement and inspiration—a celebration of creative thought and the convergence of human curiosity and technology. Here, amidst innovation and empty chairs awaiting purpose, I am both observer and participant in the unfolding possibilities of collaboration and discovery.
